project: Amigos do Trabalho - Desktop Virtual Pet
description: Fix regressions in layout edit flow, shop visual fit and buy action, and pet layering/drag interaction by enforcing node hierarchy.

userStories.title: Show remove button only in layout edit mode
userStories.description: As a player, I want the remove (X) controls to appear only when layout edit mode is active so normal mode stays non-destructive.
acceptanceCriteria: X control is hidden for all placeable items when layout edit mode is off
X control is visible for editable placeable items when layout edit mode is on
Entering and exiting edit mode toggles X visibility immediately without scene reload
Verify in browser
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Send furniture to inventory through X in edit mode
userStories.description: As a player, I want clicking X in edit mode to immediately return furniture to inventory so I can quickly reorganize the room.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking X in edit mode removes the selected placed item from the room
Removed item quantity increments in inventory immediately
No confirmation dialog is shown
X action is not available when edit mode is off
Verify in browser
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Persist layout on save
userStories.description: As a player, I want Save Layout to persist moved and edited furniture so the arrangement remains after reload.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking Save Layout writes the current furniture transforms and state to the existing persistence path
After save and scene reload or app restart, furniture positions match the saved layout
If save fails, a visible error feedback is shown and previous persisted layout remains intact
Verify in browser
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fit shop item images and buttons
userStories.description: As a player, I want shop item images to align and fit within buttons so the shop stays readable and usable.
acceptanceCriteria: Item images fit inside intended card or button bounds without overflow
Image alignment is consistent with button labels and price text
No shop item image overlaps adjacent controls in the tested viewport
Verify in browser
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix shop buy transaction behavior
userStories.description: As a player, I want the Buy action to complete reliably so coins and inventory update correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Buying an affordable item succeeds and immediately updates coin total and inventory
Buying a non-affordable item is blocked and preserves existing feedback behavior
Rapid repeated clicks do not duplicate purchases beyond defined quantity rules
Verify in browser
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Place UI and furniture nodes behind pet node
userStories.description: As a player, I want UI elements and placeable items under a node behind the pet node so pet visibility and dragging are correct.
acceptanceCriteria: Scene hierarchy has a node grouping UI elements and placeable items behind the pet node
Pet renders in front based on node or canvas order rather than only z-index tweaks
Pet remains draggable when overlapping furniture or menu visuals in lower-priority nodes
Verify in browser
Typecheck passes
